params.name: Earth Size Fix
params.description: Eratosthenes pioneered the measurement of Earth's circumference, deriving the first scientific estimate of its size. Applying coordinate principles, he mapped the world using meridians and parallels. He also coined the term geography and authored a foundational three-volume treatise, solidifying his legacy as the discipline's founding figure.
